items.name: An-Interpretable-Machine-Learning-Approach-for-Diabetes-Risk-Prediction-

The model integrates multiple patient features (glucose, insulin, BMI, age and blood pressure) to generate comprehensive risk assesment. Two types of models are used: Logistic Regression and Random Forest
